features.authDesc: JWT-based user auth with signup, login, token refresh, and optional OTP via SMS or WhatsApp.
features.itemsDesc: A ready-to-use example resource with full create, read, update, and delete support via REST API.
features.realtimeDesc: Django Channels + WebSocket service for live bidirectional updates between client and server.
features.asyncDesc: Celery workers and beat scheduler for background processing and scheduled jobs.
features.cloudDesc: Terraform infrastructure, AWS ECS on-demand backend, S3 persistence, and one-command deploy.
features.darkModeDesc: Built-in dark mode and multi-language support — just add translation keys and go.
